content:
MODULE: cosmos.core.nlp.intent_parser
FILE: cosmos/core/nlp/intent_parser.py (200 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: Intent Parser for Natural Language Commands.

Parses user commands to extract structured intents.

CLASSES:
- Intent: Parsed intent from natural language.
  Methods: def to_prompt(self) -> str
- IntentParser: Parse natural language into structured intents.

Uses pattern matching for commo
  Methods: def strip_wake_word(self, text: str) -> str
  Methods: def parse(self, text: str) -> Intent
  Methods: def has_wake_word(self, text: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def parse_with_llm(self, text: str) -> Intent
